rationale: The current translation (which matches the selected commit) is excellent. It preserves the commented-out MDX block, maintains the energetic tone ('hacer hervir la sangre'), and correctly handles the technical terminology. The previously reported broken link for Robb Report is actually correct in the current file (it does not have the '../' prefix), so no further suggestions are required.

suggestionLog.reason: The candidate accidentally added '../' to an absolute external URL, breaking the link.
suggestionLog.note: Applied exact replacement to selected MDX.
